app.dashboard.experiments.attributes.app.dashboard.experiments.attributes.dec: Declare an attribute for use in targeting rules.
Declared attributes your SDKs can target on — country, plan, signup date, custom traits.
Declaring an attribute lets you reference it in targeting rules without typos, with the right data type.
